style_authority.note: Uses the calm restrained enterprise-console authority and centers the operator's next-hour attention decision.

reference_selection.note: Selects dashboard hierarchy, taste, design-move, token, accessibility, resilient-state, and validation guidance at the needed depth.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Rejects equal cards, decorative area-chart treatment, and generic tips for an exception-first operational priority surface.

evidence_level.note: Correctly labels the evidence L0 prompt-only and avoids browser, DOM, screenshot, responsive, and runtime claims.

verified_boundary.note: Clearly separates prompt facts from unverified visual, interaction, accessibility, token, state, data-scale, and performance behavior.

design_moves.note: Gives lead-support-queue hierarchy, task-first table, diagnostic chart, contextual operations support, semantic color, and resilient states.

scope_control.note: Stays concise at 104 lines, read-only, dashboard-specific, prioritized, and within the requested budget.
